chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, MIRPURKHAS C.P No.D-1742 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 23.04.2025 Petitioner No.1/Attorney is present in person Mr. Muhammad Sharif Solangi Assistant A.G Sindh a/w Chief Officer District Council Saghar (Abdul Hafeez Jamali) and Chief Accounts Officer District Council (Sikander Ali) <>*<> Petitioner No.1 Syed Shah Zaman Mosvi is present in person and states that he is also attorney of rest of petitioners. He has referred special power of attorney available at page-745 of the Court’s time. He further submits that their grievance has been redressed, therefore, he does not wish to press this petition. He has also filed his affidavit, duly sworn, in this regard, which is taken on record. Chief Officer and Chief Accounts Officer of District Council Sanghar are present and submit that matters between them/official respondents and petitioners has been resolved amicably. Accordingly this petition is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE *Sajjad*
